phrases.intent_en: Ask what Carouge is known for
phrases.cultural_note: Carouge is Geneva's bohemian quarter — a separately founded Sardinian town with distinctive arcaded streets, artisan workshops, independent boutiques and a village atmosphere.

responses.english: Take line 12 towards Bachet and get off at the Carouge, Place du Marché stop.
responses.phonetic: KEL a-REH duh TRAHM poor ka-ROOZH
responses.french: Prenez la ligne 12 en direction de Bachet et descendez à l'arrêt Carouge, Place du Marché.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to Carouge
phrases.text_local: Comment me rendre à Carouge depuis le centre-ville ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MOHN muh ROHN-druh ah kah-ROOZH duh-PWEE luh SON-truh-VEEL
phrases.cultural_note: Tram lines 12 and 18 connect the city centre directly to Carouge in about 15 minutes. The Marché stop drops you right in the heart of the neighbourhood.

responses.english: Take tram 12 from Place du Molard, it drops you off at Carouge center in about 10 minutes.
responses.phonetic: kaw-MAHN muh RAHNDR ah ka-ROOZH duh-PWEE luh SAHN-truh-VEEL
responses.french: Prenez le tram 12 depuis la place du Molard, il vous dépose au centre de Carouge en environ 10 minutes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about artisan shops and studios
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des ateliers d'artisans à visiter dans ce quartier ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL day zah-tuh-LYAY dar-tee-ZON ah vee-zee-TAY don suh kar-TYAY
phrases.cultural_note: Carouge is famous for its artisan workshops — potters, jewellers, glassblowers and leather workers — many of which welcome visitors to watch them at work.

responses.english: The shop closes at 6 PM. Break from 12 PM to 2 PM. Closed on Mondays.
responses.phonetic: ah kel UR FERM lah boo-TEEK
responses.french: La boutique ferme à 18h. Pause de 12h à 14h. Fermée le lundi.

phrases.text_local: Le marché du samedi à Carouge vaut-il le détour ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh mar-SHAY doo sahm-DEE ah kah-ROOZH voh-TEEL luh day-TOOR
phrases.cultural_note: The Saturday morning market on Place du Marché in Carouge is one of the most charming in the Geneva region, with local produce, flowers, cheese and specialty foods.

responses.english: I recommend 'Le Petit Bistro' on the corner, they offer lunch set menus around 15 euros.
responses.french: Je vous recommande « Le Petit Bistro » au coin de la rue, ils proposent des formules déjeuner autour de 15 euros.
